aliases.description: The aliases of the channel. Alternative hostnames, only applicable to web channels. For example, an alias of the hostname `www.blueconic.com` could be `blueconic.com`.

items.description: The aliases of the channel. Alternative hostnames, only applicable to web channels. For example, an alias of the hostname `www.blueconic.com` could be `blueconic.com`.

creationDate.description: The creation date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

hostname.description: The hostname of the channel. For web channels, the hostname of the website, excluding the protocol (e.g. `https://`) and path (e.g. `/`). For mobile channels, the App ID. For email channels, the hostname is empty.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last modified date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

lastVisitedDate.description: The date and time when the channel was last visited.

visitorCount.description: The visitor count of the channel.
